summary: Strong PowerShell module design with good error handling. CRITICAL VIOLATIONS: (1) Actions not pinned to commit SHAs—explicit requirement violation; should pin actions/checkout@v4 and actions/upload-artifact@v4 to 40-char commit SHAs. (2) Exit code logic (Aggregate-TestResults.ps1 lines ~30-35) flawed: condition `$flakyCount -eq 0` fails to detect hard failures when flaky tests are present; should check `$result.Aggregate.Failed.Count -gt 0` directly. These bugs prevent shipping; refactoring is needed before deployment.
